meaning: n.[总称]塔珀家用塑料制品
examples: She has just come back from a Tupperware party where the hostess put too much kirsch in the punch, so she's a little drunk.
With the big ones, you fill up all your Tupperware containers and you’re still not done.
Couple weeks later, I brought a Tupperware box of left over Penne with Meat sauce for lunch.
Two companies were shortlisted for comparison: Tupperware and TEKCO (company name disguised to preserve confidentiality).
The other day I found that we had a Tupperware to store Tupperware lids.
